description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_TAG variable set to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Define two stages, build and pip, and add a build_image job in the build stage that runs only on tag pipelines, executes docker login -u $DOCKER_USERNAME -p $DOCKER_PASSWORD, docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG ., and docker push $IMAGE_TAG. Add a pip_register job in the pip stage that also runs only on tags, uses the python:3.6 image, runs pip install setuptools, creates a ~/.pypirc file with the PYPI_USERNAME and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, and then runs python setup.py register -r pypi sdist upload -r pypi. Both jobs are assigned the runner tag docker.
